Shanif Dhanani.name: Shanif Dhanani
Shanif Dhanani.title: Founder, Nobi
Shanif Dhanani.bio: Shanif Dhanani is a data scientist and engineer building Nobi, an AI assistant that powers search, discovery, support, and selling. He previously founded Apteo, was lead engineer and data scientist at TapCommerce, and did product data science at Twitter after Twitter acquired TapCommerce.
